retro: Clean — no automated issues, no stale sprint branches, no actionable user feedback.
backlog_health: Healthy — 5 S-effort issues remain (#3 PWA prompt, #6 camera links, #9 status link, #10, #11); one L-effort issue (#8 push notifications).

issues.title: Evacuation zones during alerts
issues.meta: Shows active Marin County evac zones (Warning/Order) below Contacts during alert state
issues.body: Adds fetchMarinEvacZones() calling Marin County OES ArcGIS. Active zones render as color-coded rows (red = Order, amber = Warning) in a new section below the emergency contact buttons. Section stays hidden when no active zones or outside alert state.

issues.title: Feed freshness on pill sub-line
issues.meta: Appends '· updated Xm ago' to pill sub-line during alert when newest feed is >2 min old
issues.body: During alert state, buildState() now computes the age of the most recently refreshed live feed. If that age exceeds 2 minutes, the timestamp is appended to the pill sub-line so users can gauge data freshness at a glance without scrolling to the feed footer.

blocker: CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN not available in build environment — deploy to staging/prod requires running 'npx wrangler deploy' locally or via CI with the token set.
